name: cytoscape-edge-visibility-optimization
description: Cytoscape.js DAG visualization patterns: (1) hide all edges at baseline for performance — show only selected team edges on demand, (2) read-only graph via autoungrabify+autounselectify, (3) day filter phase visibility rules for start/end ranking columns, (4) node-click trajectory includes all team roles (home/away/work). Use when: a Cytoscape graph renders slowly with many edges, or has unwanted node dragging, or day filter boundary columns misbehave.
